title: Loading
description: Displays a loading indicator. Supports embedding a spinner inline or showing a modal overlay via service. Inherits core behavior from MXBaseComponent.

sections.title: Region
sections.description: Show loading on screen, within a container, or inside a button.

sections.title: Spinner size
sections.description: Control spinner size via the size input.

sections.title: Spinner stroke size
sections.description: Control spinner border thickness via the stroke input.

sections.title: Spinner color
sections.description: Use theme colors or 'white'/'black' for the spinner.

sections.title: Directive
sections.description: Use the [axIsLoading] directive to overlay a spinner on a container.

sections.title: Service overlay
sections.description: Programmatically show and hide a modal overlay on screen or within a container.

sections.title: Service doLoading
sections.description: Recommended pattern: wrap an Observable using doLoading(...).

sections.title: Multi loader state
sections.description: Manage separate loader states using loaderId in the same context.

sections.title: Context
sections.description: Pass [context] to configure the internal spinner (text, color, size, stroke).

sections.title: Spinner text
sections.description: Display text next to the spinner using the text input.

sections.title: Spinner contrast
sections.description: Use color="white" or color="black" for contrast over backgrounds.

props.name: id
props.description: Unique identifier for the component. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

props.name: type
props.description: Specifies the loading indicator type. Current value: 'spinner'.

props.name: context
props.description: Assigns fields to the spinner instance (via portal attach).

events.name: onOptionChanged
events.description: Fired when an option related to the component changes. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

methods.content:
/**
 * Gets the host HTML element of the component.
 *
 * @returns T - The native DOM element associated with this component.
 */
getHostElement<T = HTMLElement>(): T

/**
 * Sets a component option with optional lifecycle callbacks.
 *
 * @param option - The option configuration containing the name, value and optional before/after callbacks.
 */
setOption<T = any>(option: MXComponentSetOption<T>)

props.name: text
props.description: The text to display alongside the spinner.

props.name: axIsLoading
props.description: Places an overlay with a spinner over the host element when true.

methods.content:
/**
 * Shows a modal loading overlay.
 *
 * If a host element is provided via `config.location`, the overlay is attached to that
 * element; otherwise it is attached to `document.body`.
 *
 * @param config Optional configuration: host `location`, `type`, and `context` passed to the spinner instance.
 * @returns number Unique loading reference id to be used with {@link hide}.
 */
show(config?: { location?: Element; type?: string; context?: unknown }): number

/**
 * Hides a previously shown modal loading overlay.
 *
 * @param id Loading reference id returned by {@link show}.
 */
hide(id: number): void

/**
 * Wraps an Observable and toggles loading for its duration.
 *
 * Starts loading before subscription settles and ends loading on finalize.
 *
 * @param source$ Source observable.
 * @param context Loading context key.
 * @param loaderId Optional id to scope multiple loaders per context.
 * @returns Observable<V> The original stream with loading side effects.
 */
doLoading<V>(source$: Observable<V>, context: object, loaderId?: string | number): Observable<V>

/**
 * Returns current loading state for the given context and optional loader id.
 *
 * @param context Loading context key.
 * @param loaderId Optional loader id.
 * @returns boolean True if any matching loader is active.
 */
isLoading(context: object, loaderId?: string | number): boolean

/**
 * Observable loading state for the given context and optional loader id.
 * Initializes the state if it does not exist yet.
 *
 * @param context Loading context key.
 * @param loaderId Optional loader id.
 * @returns Observable<boolean>
 */
isLoading$(context: object, loaderId?: string | number): Observable<boolean>

/**
 * Sets loading state to true for the given context/loader id.
 *
 * @param context Loading context key.
 * @param loaderId Optional loader id.
 * @returns void
 */
startLoading(context: object, loaderId?: string | number): void

/**
 * Sets loading state to false for the given context/loader id.
 *
 * @param context Loading context key.
 * @param loaderId Optional loader id.
 * @returns void
 */
endLoading(context: object, loaderId?: string | number): void

/**
 * Clears all tracked loading states across all contexts.
 *
 * @returns void
 */
clearLoadings(): void
